title: alchemilla alpina var. vestita
intro: Alchemilla alpina var. vestita, also known as the hairy alpine lady's mantle, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and tannins. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Alchemilla alpina var. vestita can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use.
